title: catevala × subrigida
intro: Catevala × subrigida, also known as Cat's Claw, is a type of tropical vine native to the Amazon rainforest, its name derived from the hook-like claws of its roots. Traditionally, Cat's Claw has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Catevala × subrigida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, making it a popular supplement in natural medicine.
